'''âs-h-m''' ('''kasaham''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:young|young]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-h-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:young|young]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-h-m
|-
! Lemma
| kasaham
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisaham|thisaham]] || [[word:jisaham|jisaham]] || [[word:shisaham|shisaham]] || [[word:kisaham|kisaham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusaham|thuthusaham]] || [[word:jujusaham|jujusaham]] || [[word:shushusaham|shushusaham]] || [[word:kukusaham|kukusaham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusaham|thusaham]] || [[word:jusaham|jusaham]] || [[word:shusaham|shusaham]] || [[word:kusaham|kusaham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusaham|thusaham]] || [[word:jusaham|jusaham]] || [[word:shusaham|shusaham]] || [[word:kusaham|kusaham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesaham|thesaham]] || [[word:jesaham|jesaham]] || [[word:shesaham|shesaham]] || [[word:kesaham|kesaham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosaham|thothosaham]] || [[word:jojosaham|jojosaham]] || [[word:shoshosaham|shoshosaham]] || [[word:kokosaham|kokosaham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosaham|thosaham]] || [[word:josaham|josaham]] || [[word:shosaham|shosaham]] || [[word:kosaham|kosaham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosaham|thosaham]] || [[word:josaham|josaham]] || [[word:shosaham|shosaham]] || [[word:kosaham|kosaham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsaham|thĂŠsaham]] || [[word:jĂŠsaham|jĂŠsaham]] || [[word:shĂŠsaham|shĂŠsaham]] || [[word:kĂŠsaham|kĂŠsaham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasaham|thathasaham]] || [[word:jajasaham|jajasaham]] || [[word:shashasaham|shashasaham]] || [[word:kakasaham|kakasaham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasaham|thasaham]] || [[word:jasaham|jasaham]] || [[word:shasaham|shasaham]] || [[word:kasaham|kasaham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasaham|thasaham]] || [[word:jasaham|jasaham]] || [[word:shasaham|shasaham]] || [[word:kasaham|kasaham]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasaham|shasaham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasaham|goshasaham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasaham|gokishasaham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasahamnĂŒ|shasahamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasahamnknĂŒ|goshasahamnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasahamnĂŒ|gokishasahamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasahamshĂ«|shasahamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasahamnkshĂ«|goshasahamnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasahamshĂ«|gokishasahamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasahamro|shasahamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasahamnkro|goshasahamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasahamro|gokishasahamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasahamu|shasahamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasahamnkmu|goshasahamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasahamu|gokishasahamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasahamsher|shasahamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasahamnksher|goshasahamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasahamsher|gokishasahamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasahamng|shasahamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasahamnkng|goshasahamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasahamng|gokishasahamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasahamya|shasahamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasahamnkya|goshasahamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasahamya|gokishasahamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasahamyam|shasahamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasahamnkyam|goshasahamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasahamyam|gokishasahamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasahamnĂŒshĂ«|shasahamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasahamnknĂŒshĂ«|goshasahamnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasahamnĂŒshĂ«|gokishasahamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasahamnĂŒro|shasahamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasahamnknĂŒro|goshasahamnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasahamnĂŒro|gokishasahamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasahamnĂŒmu|shasahamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasahamnknĂŒmu|goshasahamnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasahamnĂŒmu|gokishasahamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasahamshĂ«nĂŒ|shasahamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasahamnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasahamnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasahamshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasahamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasahamshĂ«ro|shasahamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasahamnkshĂ«ro|goshasahamnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasahamshĂ«ro|gokishasahamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasahamshĂ«mu|shasahamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasahamnkshĂ«mu|goshasahamnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasahamshĂ«mu|gokishasahamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasahamronĂŒ|shasahamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasahamnkronĂŒ|goshasahamnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasahamronĂŒ|gokishasahamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasahamroshĂ«|shasahamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasahamnkroshĂ«|goshasahamnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasahamroshĂ«|gokishasahamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasahamromu|shasahamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasahamnkromu|goshasahamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasahamromu|gokishasahamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasahamunĂŒ|shasahamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasahamnkmunĂŒ|goshasahamnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasahamunĂŒ|gokishasahamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasahamushĂ«|shasahamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasahamnkmushĂ«|goshasahamnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasahamushĂ«|gokishasahamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasahamuro|shasahamuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasahamnkmuro|goshasahamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasahamuro|gokishasahamuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
